Localization.Description: A file was created using a Python or Ruby script

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} created file "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host} using a Ruby script
Multiple files ({object.name}) were created on host {event_src.host} using a Ruby script
Multiple files ({object.name}) were created on host {event_src.host} using a Python script
User {subject.account.name} created multiple files ({object.name}) on host {event_src.host} using a Ruby script
User {subject.account.name} created multiple files ({object.name}) on host {event_src.host} using a Python script
File "{object.name}" was created on host {event_src.host} using a Ruby script
File "{object.name}" was created on host {event_src.host} using a Python script
User {subject.account.name} created file "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host} using a Python script
